clusters.title: Product copy and tone principles for capture and synthesis
clusters.summary: A set of notes on product messaging, tone, and the core promise of low-friction capture followed by AI-driven organization.
keyPoints: Clipboard should feel like a quiet inbox, not a dashboard.
Core principle: capture first, organize later.
Homepage tone should be warm yet technical, avoiding enterprise polish.
Product promise is calm synthesis, not manual filing.
clusters.reason: Multiple captures directly discuss product copy, messaging tone, and the core user promise, aligning strongly with the 'Product Writing Playbook' topic.

possibleTopics.reason: Directly about product copy, messaging, and tone.
Related to capture and organization workflows.

clusters.title: Rust/Tauri build and compilation error
clusters.summary: Terminal command for a cargo check and a related Rust compilation error, indicating active development work.
keyPoints: Ran `cargo check` on a Tauri project manifest.
Encountered a Rust type mismatch error (`E0308`) in `ipc_schema.rs`.
clusters.reason: Captures contain a Rust build command and a specific Rust compiler error, which are highly relevant to the 'Rust Background Compiler' topic concerning development and compilation.

possibleTopics.reason: Directly involves Rust compilation commands and errors.

clusters.title: Miscellaneous personal and workflow reminders
clusters.summary: Two unrelated, simple action items: a purchase reminder and a workflow note about screenshots.
keyPoints: Reminder to buy an HDMI adapter.
Note to rename screenshots before uploading.
clusters.reason: These are simple, disparate action items without a clear unifying theme or connection to existing topics. They are best handled as individual inbox items for review.
missingContext: Purpose or project context for the HDMI adapter.
Why screenshots need renaming and for what platform.
